heading: Administration; other use permitted by Secretary
label: 18235 Administration; other use permitted by Secretary
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2235(a)50:883(c) (less 1st sentence, and less last 70 words of last sentence).(less 1st sentence), .Sept. 11, 1950, ch. 945, § 4(c)64 Stat. 8302235(b)50:883(c) (last 70 words of last sentence).In subsection (a), the words “from time to time” and “or appropriations” are omitted as surplusage.In subsection (b), the words “United States” are substituted for the words “Federal Government”. The words “units of” are omitted as surplusage. The words “may not” are substituted for the words “shall at no time”.

children.text: administer, operate, maintain, and equip facilities constructed, expanded, rehabilitated, or converted under or otherwise acquired and used for the purposes of this chapter;section 18233 of this title
permit persons or organizations other than members and units of the armed forces to use those facilities under such leases or other agreements as he considers appropriate; and

cover the payments received under those leases or agreements into the Treasury to the credit of the appropriation from which the cost of maintaining the facility, including its utilities and services, is paid.
for administering and training the reserve components of the armed forces; or
in time of war or national emergency, by other units of the armed forces or by the United States for any other purpose.
